title: diopetes #1356
definition:
1) fallen from Zeus, i.e. from heaven
 2) an image of the Ephesian Artemis which was supposed to have fallen
    from heaven
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) fallen from Zeus, i.e. from heaven
 2) an image of the Ephesian Artemis which was supposed to have fallen
    from heaven
